$comment: Cold Store Money Calculator (Tool 10) — commodity spoilage rates, PK selling price defaults, capacity factors. INDICATIVE — user-editable selling price, ±25% band applied at output.
$sources: FAO Postharvest Loss Compendium 2011 (commodity losses without cold chain)
Punjab Agriculture Marketing Board postharvest survey 2022-2024
Pakistan Bureau of Statistics wholesale price survey 2024-2025
WHO TRS 961 Annex 9 (pharmaceutical cold chain spoilage assumed near-zero with chain, 100% economic loss at chain break)

fx.$comment: Hardcoded indicative FX rates — base currency PKR. Update when any rate drifts more than 5% (last revision triggered if PKR weakens significantly or any pegged GCC currency revalues). UI shows the as-of date with an honest 'confirm exact pricing with engineer' band. The +-25% uncertainty band on outputs swamps any small FX drift.

commodities.label: Mango (Sindhri, Chaunsa)
commodities.notes: FAO PK mango loss study: 35-50% loss farm-to-market without cold chain. Cold chain drops to 5-8%.

commodities.label: Dates (Aseel, Karbalaiyan)
commodities.notes: Sindh/Balochistan dates. CA storage extends to 12 months at +0.5°C, 2-5% O2.

commodities.label: Citrus (Kinnow, orange)
commodities.notes: Sargodha belt. Without cold chain, kinnow loses 25-35% in 14 days post-harvest.

commodities.label: Banana (green, for ripening)
commodities.notes: Karachi import + Sindh production. Ripening rooms required.

commodities.label: Potato (table + seed)
commodities.notes: Okara/Pakpattan/Sahiwal. Seed potato requires +2-4°C with sprout suppression.

commodities.label: Onion
commodities.notes: Mirpurkhas/Khairpur. Critical for price stabilisation during glut.

commodities.label: Tomato
commodities.notes: Pre-cooling critical. Chilling injury below +10°C for unripe.

commodities.label: Dairy (milk, yoghurt, cheese)
commodities.notes: Engro/Olper's/Nestlé MCC model. 2% loss with chain, 25% without.

commodities.label: Meat & Poultry (chilled)
commodities.notes: Carcass chilling + frozen storage. HACCP scope.

commodities.label: Seafood (shrimp, fish frozen)
commodities.notes: Karachi coast. Export grade requires blast at -35°C.

commodities.label: Pharmaceutical (vaccines, biologics)
commodities.notes: WHO TRS 961 Annex 9. ANY chain break = total economic loss. PKR/kg includes vial + biological.

commodities.label: FMCG frozen (ice cream, ready meals)
commodities.notes: Gourmet/Omore scale. Chain break = total loss (re-freeze rejected).

cities_tariff.$comment: PKR/kWh — commercial B-3 industrial tariff 2025-26 weighted average. Karachi = K-Electric, others = LESCO/MEPCO/IESCO/FESCO/HESCO/PESCO/QESCO/TESCO depending on city.
cities_tariff.$comment_gcc: Saudi SEC industrial commercial tariff approx PKR 18/kWh equivalent (SAR 0.24/kWh @ PKR 75/SAR). DEWA Dubai approx PKR 22/kWh.

capex_pkr_per_m3.$comment: All-in cold store capex including PIR panels, refrigeration, civil, doors, controls. Tighter band than uncertainty allows for envelope choice. Used as midpoint with ±20%.

opex_kwh_per_m3_per_year.$comment: Annual kWh per m3 by temperature class. ASHRAE Ch. 24 simplified rule-of-thumb adjusted for Pakistan 42-45 deg C summer ambient. Lower bound = well-insulated 100mm panel, upper bound = thin panel + high dock cycling. Use midpoint.

opex_extras_pct_of_capex.$comment: Annual non-electricity opex: maintenance, consumables, labour, monitoring. Percentage of total capex.

throughput_to_capacity_factor.$comment: Multiplier from monthly throughput (tonnes) to required storage capacity (tonnes-held-on-average). Lower = faster turnover (e.g. 3PL), higher = longer storage (e.g. CA, seed potato, dates).
